name: Apple Honey Glazed Chicken^
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat grill or broiler.
2. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except the chicken; blend well.
3. When ready to barbecue, oil the grill rack.
4. Brush the chicken with the apple mixture.
5. Place the chicken on the gas grill over medium heat or on charcoal grill 4-6 inches from medium coals, or on the broiler rack 4-6 inches from the heat.
6. Cook for 15-20 minutes until juices run clear and the chicken is fork tender, turning occasionally and brushing frequently with the apple mixture.
4 servings.
Per serving: 160 calories, 27 g protein, 5 g carbohydrate, 3 g (17%) fat, 73 mg cholesterol, 160 mg sodium, 230 mg potassium, 3 lean meat exchanges.
